headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Mettler-Toledo Intl, Lowers Price Target to $1425
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Mettler-Toledo Intl (NYSE:MTD) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $1515 to $1425.
